title: Environmental Data Record
description: Recorded and derived observations and measurements of physical, chemical, biological, geological, and geophysical properties of the Earth system, including correlative data, metadata, documentation...

definitions.definition: Recorded and derived observations and measurements of physical, chemical, biological, geological, and geophysical properties of the Earth system, including correlative data, metadata, documentation, and numerical model outputs.
definitions.sources:
- NOAA Data Management Planning Procedural Directive, Version 2.0.1, Environmental Data Management Committee; NOAA Administrative Order 212-15
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
